# zohomail Provider

Terraform provider bootstrap for managing Zoho Mail resources.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    zohomail = {
      source = "kefjbo/zohomail"
    }
  }
}

provider "zohomail" {}
```
